## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe the changes in this pull request. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill update (non-breaking)
- [ ] Skill update (breaking — major version bump required)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] The skill YAML is valid and follows the `schema_version: "1.0"` format
- [ ] `metadata.name` is unique and uses kebab-case
- [ ] `metadata.version` follows Semantic Versioning and is incremented appropriately
- [ ] All required parameters are listed under `spec.parameters.required`
- [ ] All return fields are documented under `spec.returns.properties`
- [ ] `skills/README.md` table is updated to include the new or changed skill
- [ ] Root `README.md` table is updated if a new skill was added
